titleStmt.title: SII 17.617: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 617. (A.R. No. 571 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Achalēśvara shrine in the south-east corner of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription is dated in the 303rd day of the 7th regnal year of Rājarājakēsarivarman, i.e., Rājarāja I.

This records an endowment of 234 kāśu equivalent to 200 kaḻañju as pudukkuppuṟam (capital funds for renovation) of the shrine for god Amarasundaradēva and goddess Umā Bhaṭṭārakī whose images were set up by Uḍaiya-pirāṭṭiyār Śembiaṉmahādēviyār in the temple of Tiruvaraṉeṟi Āḷvār at Tiruvārūr raised in stone by her. Provision was also made from these funds for worship and other offerings for the deities. The sabhā of Aḍiyappiya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam undertook to be in charge of the endowment. Śembiyaṉ Ambar-nāṭṭukkōṉār was the Śrīkāryam officer.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koirā[ja]rājakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu nāḷ 3 100 3 ṉāl coḻanāṭṭu kāviri teṉkaraiy tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu brahmateyam Aṭiyappiyac caturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom śrīyārur śrīkāryyamārāykiṉṟa cempi
ya ṉampar nāṭṭuk koṉārmeṉāyakattu tiruvāṉeṟi Āḷvār koyil tirukkaṟṟaḷi Eḻun=taruḷuvicca Uṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār śrīcempiyaṉ mahādeviyār Ikkoyilil tāṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvicca Amaracun=taratevarkkum U�bhaṭṭārakiyār
kkum tiruvamutukkum tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkum tirukkaṟṟaḷikkum cuṟṟumāḷikaikkum tiruppaḷḷi kkaṭṭil maṇṭapattukkum putukku puṟamākavum palicaikkiṭṭukkoḷkaveṉṟu Aruḷicceytu varak kāṭṭiṉa kācu 2 100 3 10 4 Ikkācu Irunūṟṟu muppa
ttu nālukkum kācu 1 ṉukku poṉ mukkāle Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyu mukkāṇiyāka Ivvūr Ūr kallāl māṟi mutalā Eṭuttu paṇṭārattu Irun=tapoṉ 2 100� Ippoṉ Irunūṟṟu kaḻañcum yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭavom koṇ
ṭa paricāvatu Ippoṉ Irunūṟṟu kaḻañcilum muppatiṉ kaḻañcu poliyiṉāl nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇai tirunilakaṇṭattāl koyilukke koṭu ceṉṟu Aṭṭakkaṭavomākavum niṉṟa poṉ nūṟṟueḻupatiṉ kaḻañcālum Āṇṭu varaiThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 17.617 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
